title: Rebuild Raj Empire Esports BGMI Tournament Website (Full Stack)

requirements.text: Implement the complete Motoko backend in a single actor with all data models and functions: Player (mobile, bgmiPlayerId, displayName, OTP simulation), Tournament (name, dateTime, entryFee, prizePool, map, totalSlots, filledSlots, upiId, qrCodeBlob, roomId, roomPassword, matchRules, status), TournamentRegistration (registrationId, tournamentId, playerId, paymentScreenshotBlob, status: Pending/Approved/Rejected), TermsAndConditions (content), SupportTicket (ticketId, playerId, playerName, subject, description, screenshotBlob optional, status: Open/Replied/Closed, createdAt, adminReply optional, repliedAt optional), and SocialLinks (youtube, instagram, telegram). Expose all CRUD, query, and mutation functions: OTP generation/verification, tournament slot management (auto-close when filledSlots reaches totalSlots), admin approval of registrations (unlocks roomId/roomPassword for approved player), support ticket create/reply/status-update, T&C get/update, and social links get/update.
acceptanceCriteria: All data models are persisted in stable storage
OTP is generated and can be verified per mobile number
One account per mobile number is enforced
Tournament filledSlots increments on approved registration; status auto-sets to Full when filledSlots equals totalSlots
Registration status can be updated to Approved/Rejected by admin
Room ID and Password are only returned to players with Approved registration status
TermsAndConditions content can be fetched and updated
SupportTicket CRUD functions work as specified
SocialLinks can be fetched and updated by admin

requirements.text: Build the player registration page at route /register with fields: mobile number, display name, BGMI Player ID (mandatory). After entering mobile, show a 4-digit OTP input step and display the simulated OTP on screen. Enforce one account per mobile — show a clear error if mobile already exists. Include an 'I agree to the Terms & Conditions' checkbox with a clickable link to /terms; disable the submit button until the checkbox is checked. On success, redirect to the player dashboard at /dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Form has mobile number, display name, and BGMI Player ID fields
After submitting mobile, OTP step is shown with the simulated code displayed on screen
Duplicate mobile number shows a clear error message
T&C checkbox is present with a link to /terms
Submit is disabled until checkbox is checked
On successful registration, player is redirected to /dashboard

requirements.text: Build the player login page at route /login using mobile number + OTP (no password). Player enters mobile, receives simulated OTP displayed on screen, enters it to log in. On success, redirect to the player dashboard at /dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Login page has mobile number input and OTP step
Simulated OTP is displayed on screen after mobile submission
Correct OTP entry logs the player in and redirects to /dashboard
Incorrect OTP shows an error message

requirements.text: Build the tournament listing page at route /tournaments showing all active tournaments as cards. Each card displays: tournament name, entry fee, prize pool, total slots, filled slots, map, date/time, and registration status (Open/Full). If matchRules is non-empty, display it below the card. Players must be logged in to register. When a tournament's slots are full, show it as 'Full' and disable the Register button.
acceptanceCriteria: All active tournaments render as cards with all specified fields
Match Rules section renders below card only when matchRules is non-empty
Register button is disabled and shows 'Full' when filledSlots equals totalSlots
Unauthenticated players are prompted to log in when clicking Register

requirements.text: Implement the payment flow: after a player clicks Register on a tournament, show a payment modal/page with the tournament's UPI ID (default: empirerajesports@ibl) and QR code image (fallback to upi-qr-placeholder.dim_300x300.png if no QR uploaded by admin). Player uploads a payment screenshot (image file). Include an 'I agree to the Terms & Conditions' checkbox. On submission, save registration with status 'Pending Admin Approval'. Room ID and Password remain hidden until admin approves.
acceptanceCriteria: Payment modal/page shows UPI ID and QR code image
Falls back to upi-qr-placeholder.dim_300x300.png when no QR is uploaded
Player can upload a payment screenshot image file
T&C checkbox must be checked before submission
Registration is saved with status Pending Admin Approval
Room ID and Password are not visible until admin approves

requirements.text: Build the player dashboard at route /dashboard showing: player's display name and BGMI Player ID, their tournament registrations with status badges (Pending/Approved/Rejected). For Approved registrations, display Room ID and Room Password. Include a Support section where the player can create new support tickets (subject, description, optional screenshot upload), view their ticket list with status badges (Open/Replied/Closed), and click a ticket to see full details including admin reply.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows player display name and BGMI Player ID
Tournament registrations are listed with correct status badges
Room ID and Room Password are visible only for Approved registrations
Support ticket creation form with subject, description, and optional screenshot upload works
Ticket list shows subject, status badge, and creation date
Clicking a ticket opens full detail view with admin reply if present

requirements.text: Build the admin dashboard accessible via a separate login page at route /admin with hardcoded credentials (username: 'Empire Esports', password: 'Shivam803119&'). Admin dashboard must have six sections: (1) Tournament Management — add/edit/delete tournaments with all fields including matchRules textarea, UPI ID, QR code upload, Room ID, Room Password; (2) Registrations — list all registrations with player info and payment screenshots, approve or reject each; (3) Player List — view all registered players; (4) Terms & Conditions — view and edit T&C content in a textarea with a save button; (5) Support Tickets — list all tickets with player name, BGMI ID, subject, status, date; click to view detail with screenshot; reply to ticket; update ticket status via dropdown/buttons; (6) Social Links — input fields for YouTube, Instagram, and Telegram URLs with a save button.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin login at /admin accepts only username 'Empire Esports' and password 'Shivam803119&'
Tournament Management section supports add/edit/delete with all fields including matchRules
Registrations section lists all registrations with payment screenshots and approve/reject actions
Player List section shows all registered players
T&C section shows current content in textarea with a functional save button
Support Tickets section lists all tickets and allows reply and status update
Social Links section has YouTube, Instagram, Telegram URL inputs with save

requirements.text: Add a dedicated Terms & Conditions page at route /terms that fetches and displays the current T&C content from the backend. Style with the dark gaming theme consistent with Raj Empire Esports branding.
acceptanceCriteria: Page at /terms fetches and renders T&C content from backend
Page uses the dark gaming theme with orange/gold accents
Page is accessible via the link in registration and payment forms

requirements.text: Apply a dark, high-energy battle-royale gaming aesthetic consistently across all pages. Use a near-black deep dark background, bold orange and gold accent colors, sharp angular UI elements, and military/tactical typography. Brand all pages, tab title, header, and footer as 'Raj Empire Esports'. Use raj-empire-esports-logo.dim_400x120.png as the site header logo. Display the Social Links (YouTube, Instagram, Telegram) fetched from the backend in the site footer as icon links.
acceptanceCriteria: All pages use near-black background with orange and gold accents
Sharp angular UI elements and military/tactical typography are applied throughout
Tab title, header, and footer all read 'Raj Empire Esports'
raj-empire-esports-logo.dim_400x120.png is used as the site header logo
Footer displays YouTube, Instagram, and Telegram icon links fetched from backend

constraints: All Motoko logic must remain in a single backend/main.mo actor file
Admin credentials are hardcoded: username 'Empire Esports', password 'Shivam803119&'
Default UPI ID is empirerajesports@ibl when no UPI is set for a tournament
Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: Real OTP SMS delivery — OTP is simulated and displayed on screen
Real payment processing — payment is manual UPI with screenshot upload
Internet Identity or Web3 wallet authentication
External database or cloud storage integration

required: Bold tactical lettering logo spelling 'Raj Empire Esports' with orange and gold gradient text on a dark/transparent background, military-style font (raj-empire-esports-logo.dim_400x120.png)
Stylized dark-themed QR code graphic with orange border accents and 'Scan to Pay' text centered below the QR pattern on a near-black background (upi-qr-placeholder.dim_300x300.png)
